backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profile management, password protection, and CMS content storage (about text, features, game details, social links, body text color), using access control mixins for admin/user authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the duplicate header bug fix is implemented in LandingPage.tsx, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with Fredoka One and Inter Google Fonts preloaded and a single root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /press-kit, /admin), QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, a shared Layout with Header, and a BodyTextColorApplier that syncs backend color to a CSS variable.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Fullscreen image overlay component with Escape key and click-to-close support, scroll lock, and a close button using stopPropagation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Site header rendering a Press Kit nav link and dark/light mode toggle, right-aligned, hidden on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Image component that shows an animated skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that triggers a direct browser download of the PokeANose_MediaImages.zip file via a programmatically created anchor element.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form with an email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future implementation.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: Full-screen fixed password gate overlay that calls the backend verifyPassword method, stores verification in sessionStorage on success, and displays inline error messages on failure.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Renders a responsive grid of six game screenshots that open in a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Displays an Instagram icon link that adapts to light/dark theme; renders nothing if the provided URL is invalid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button that, when clicked, replaces itself with an embedded YouTube iframe supporting various YouTube URL formats.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a light/dark theme context with localStorage persistence, toggling dark-mode CSS classes on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend content (about text, features, game details, social links, etc.) through the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, typography, background image, and component-specific styles like screenshots and fullscreen viewer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows an authenticated Internet Identity admin to view and update press kit content fields (about text, features, game details, social links, password protection, body text color) via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Simple landing page displaying the game logo and an embedded Brevo newsletter signup iframe, with a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Press kit page that fetches and displays game content (about, details, features, screenshots, video, social links) and shows a password gate modal if password protection is enabled.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), oklch-based design tokens for colors, border radii, animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file recording the current known issue (duplicate header after deployment) and the single existing fix-request feature targeting that duplicate header rendering bug.
